alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a disulfide group R-SS-R' where R and R' are both alkyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkyldisulfides

alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds a sulfenyl group with the general formula RS (R = organyl).
alternative_parents.name: Sulfenyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an primary aliphatic amine group.
alternative_parents.name: Monoalkylamines

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing the sulfuric acid or a derivative thereof.
class.name: Organic sulfuric acids and derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as organic sulfuric acids. These are organic compounds containing the sulfuric acid functional group, with the generic structure HOS(=O)(=O)OH.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing the sulfuric acid functional group, with the generic structure HOS(=O)(=O)OH.
direct_parent.name: Organic sulfuric acids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing the sulfuric acid functional group, with the generic structure HOS(=O)(=O)OH.
subclass.name: Organic sulfuric acids

superclass.description: Compounds an organic acid or a derivative thereof.
superclass.name: Organic acids and derivatives
